positive: A whimsical, maximalist arrangement of stylized celestial elements and woodland fauna. Features bioluminescent jellyfish floating among deep-rooted, ornate trees. Central composition includes a crescent moon crescent intertwined with geometric constellations and a group of ethereal, stylized forest spirits and hummingbirds with vibrant, saturated wings. The color palette should be deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, gold leaf accents, and pops of electric turquoise. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with modern psychedelic illustration, emphasizing clean, strong outlines, stylized silhouettes, high contrast, and intricate repeating patterns. Perfect for a clean, high-definition, repeat apparel print. --ar 1:1 --style cinematic
